name: Aureus Inc.
summary: Aureus Incrated, an exploration stage company, develops and explores for mineral properties in Nevada and Montana. It holds interest in the Keene Placer claims that cover an area of 19.67 acres located in Broadwater County, Montana; and Western Star Lode claim and Mill site, which covers an area of 13.22 acres located in the Confederate Gulch mining district in Broadwater County, Montana. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Atlanta, Georgia. Aureus Incorporated is a subsidiary of Maverick, LLC.
